content: The sig validation cache for pending deposits?

author: jtraglia
content: Awesome. <@808969530608451584> we should (eventually) make a test case for this. Ie ensure clients can handle a large number of new builder deposits which will be processed at the fork. Maybe ~2k deposits per slot in the epoch leading up to the fork.

author: jtraglia
content: That would be 64k signature validations at the fork.

author: terencechain
content:
oh.. that i dont have.. but i will add eventually 🙂
sorry i missunderstood you.. the cache here is purely
using gloas slot `n-1`'s dead time to verify payload's deposit request signatures.. then track the result.. then apply it to `n` when we process the beacon block
